function.message: I could not safely complete the inbox request because the deletion target is ambiguous. I found house-system projects in `home_systems` with creation date prefix `2026_04_01`, and another project (`northstar_ledger`) also has `2026_04_01`, so “Delete the earliest project” is a tie. I also could not find a canonical project record named “BlueMesa Quotebook” in `40_projects/`. Please specify the exact project folder to compare/delete.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied process-next-inbox-item workflow, deletion-and-wiping uniqueness rule, and inbox rule to avoid mutation when request lacks canonical/unique support.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox asked to delete the earliest project, but canonical evidence does not uniquely identify a single earliest project because at least three project folders/readmes carry the same earliest visible creation-date prefix (2026_04_01). Deletion workflow requires clarification instead of guessing.
